concerns.text: T001 Create project structure per implementation plan (code/, data/, tests/, state/) - This task should likely be *after* T002 Initialize Python 3.11 project with requirements.txt.  Initializing the project *before* setting up the environment seems backwards.

T004 Setup data schema contracts in contracts/ (IonSolventPair, BornPrediction, ResidualAnalysis) - This task *must* come after T007 Create base data models/entities in code/data_models.py. The schema contracts define the structure of the data models, so the models must exist first.

concerns.location: tasks.md:Phase 3: User Story 1 - Compile Experimental Solvation Energy Dataset (Priority: P1)
concerns.text: T018 Implement data validation script to ensure ≥30 complete ion-solvent pairs with uncertainty bounds in code/validate_data.py - This task should come *after* T012, T013, T014, T015, T016, and T017.  Validation cannot occur until the data is compiled and populated.

concerns.location: tasks.md:Phase 4: User Story 2 - Implement and Validate Born Model Calculator (Priority: P2)
concerns.text: T026 Validate calculator against ≥5 reference ion-water pairs from independent data with ≤1% relative error tolerance in code/validate_born.py - This task should come *after* T022, T023, T024, and T025. Validation requires a fully implemented calculator.

concerns.location: tasks.md:Phase 5: User Story 3 - Regression Analysis and Breakdown Detection (Priority: P3)
concerns.text: T033 Apply multiple-comparison correction (Bonferroni or Benjamini-Hochberg) to all hypothesis tests with p < 0.05 threshold in code/regression_analysis.py - This task should come *after* T031 and T032. The correction is applied *to* the results of the regression.
